data.name: Sex Inspector 🚬💋
data.detailed_description:
Get ready to dive into our newest hottest 18+visual novel Sex Inspector🚬💋, full of mysterious characters, thrilling discoveries and jazzed up 3D sex scenes. This is your gateway to a steamy, dangerous adventure in 1940s Chicago.



Imagine this: Chicago, the 1940s, jazz is hot, and so are the mysteries. Wealthy businessman Howard Phillips is dead, and you're on the case. But be careful—this city's full of people who are as seductive as they are suspect, and it's your job to sift through the lies, flirtations, and secrets.


Features:
  • Choices That Sizzle: Dive into a steamy plot where your choices will not only solve the mystery but also spark some flames.
  • Spicy Endings: Multiple endings mean your decisions could lead you to a dangerous liaison or straight to the solution of the crime.
  • Grilling Suspects: Put your detective hat on and your flirting shoes because questioning suspects is as intense as it gets.
  • Seek and Find the Stuff: Keep your eyes peeled for hidden objects that are key to cracking the case.
  • Complex Relationships: Navigate through a maze of motives and desires—everyone's hiding something, but some secrets are more inviting than others.

Grab your magnifying glass and maybe a fan, because Sex Inspector is about to turn up the heat. Can you keep your cool and solve the case, or will you get too caught up in the city’s tempting distractions?

data.short_description: Sex Inspector🚬💋 is a 18+ visual novel where every sultry alley and shadowy figure could lead to thrilling encounters or chilling discoveries. Think you can handle the heat?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
